name: Witch Hunter 2. Legacy of the Lost

reviews.review_description:
Couldn't even get past the tutorial. Too much jank and clunk with the controls. Swinging the melee weapons was comical and the shotgun has no effect on the monster.

Maybe I'll try again in a few days. Maybe.

Even in Early Access, this game delivers an incredible level of realism that truly immerses you in its world. The attention to detail and atmosphere make every moment feel engaging and lifelike. While there are still some areas to refine, the current experience is already worth playing. Plus, with exciting updates and a continuation on the horizon, now is the perfect time to jump in!

developer_response.body: Your feedback and ratings are very important to us. thank you

reviews.review_description:
This VR arena game is an absolute blast! Armed with a variety of weapons, you’ll fight to survive in intense battles with excellent character animations that make every encounter feel dynamic and satisfying.

One of the best parts is the fun anachronism—you can bring a bazooka to a sword fight, which leads to hilarious and over-the-top moments. The execution is top-notch, making every battle feel smooth, engaging, and endlessly entertaining.

If you love fast-paced VR combat with a touch of chaos and creativity, this game is a must-play!

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (5/5)

developer_response.body: thanks for review . Your feedback and ratings are very important to us.

reviews.review_description:
Lots of squid/half crab monster humanoids 
And pretty girl warior

developer_response.body: any assessment is good. And a good grade is even better. Thank you.
